title: Anno just sued Gainax
wikitext:
[]: Anno just sued Gainax Post by qu4d » Fri Dec 02, 2016 1:25 pm According to the Mainichi Shimbun, Gainax is contractually bound to pay royalties to Khara for projects Anno worked on, but Gainax now owes a large amount in back payments. Moreover, Khara made a special loan to Gainax for 100 million yen (US$877,636) in August 2014 and is now suing to get the unpaid amount back.

[]: Re: Anno just sued Gainax Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 02, 2016 1:52 pm thread/18748/Studio-Khara-Sues-Gainax-for-100-Million-Yen-in-Royalties/
